title: {YTP} ~ Jaunt Ron
description:
Alarm Copter ( https://www.youtube.com/user/AlarmCopter ) has probably waited the longest for his video. Here you go, good sir. Oh, and also everyone else who has been waiting for me to make a JonTron video. And also everyone who's been waiting for me to make a video in general. I have no excuse.
